name: Commander of the "Angels" || Eve and Raven
description:
Command the new "Angel" Squad with Eve and Raven

(Serving the Ark in disguise until you three can get home)

Description: Stranded in another world with Eve and Raven, you three soon form a small, elite commando squad, temporarily working for the Ark to gather more information about this dimension and how to get home. Although, the atmosphere does tense each and every day, given Eve and Raven relationship...

Series: NIKKE - Goddess of Victory x Stellar Blade

Note: user is the equivalent of Adam in Raven's POV. Adam doesn't exist.
creator: Chunter
